definition: Real rates at ~2.0-2.2% 10Y TIPS are the cross-asset fulcrum with asymmetric impacts. 50bp rise: Mag-7 -12-15%, S&P 500 -6-8%, IG spreads +10-20bp, DXY +2-3%. 50bp decline helps equities but weakens dollar, stressing the capex-profit-inflow feedback loop. Creates a 'no good outcome' dynamic for US-centric multi-asset portfolios.
evidence: 50bp real rate rise: Mag-7 -12-15%, S&P 500 -6-8%, IG spreads +10-20bp, DXY +2-3%
50bp real rate decline helps equities but weakens dollar
Asymmetry creates no-good-outcome for US multi-asset portfolios
Sensitivity estimates subject to plus/minus 30% estimation error
open_questions: Whether the no-good-outcome dynamic holds across all rate move magnitudes
Interaction with Fed policy path and forward guidance
